title: Meta to cut 10% of Reality Labs staff to focus on AI
text:
Meta to cut 10% of Reality Labs staff to focus on AI
2026-01-13
Meta is set to lay off over 10% of its Reality Labs staff, a division responsible for AI glasses and VR headsets, as part of a cost-cutting initiative. The cuts will disproportionately impact employees working on virtual reality hardware and social platforms, despite the division achieving notable sales growth and increased demand for its products.
